Class HideSequentPrintFilter

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.pp.SequentPrintFilter
de.uka.ilkd.key.pp.SearchSequentPrintFilter
de.uka.ilkd.key.pp.HideSequentPrintFilter
public class HideSequentPrintFilter extends SearchSequentPrintFilter
This filter takes a search string and yields a sequent containing only sequent formulas that match the search.
